title: Reduce Your Risk: Choose Legal Cannabis (infographic) - Canada.ca
content:
## Reduce Your Risk: Choose Legal Cannabis (infographic)
Download in PDF format (3.04 MB, 1 pages)
Organization: Health Canada
Published: 2022-05-02
Choosing legal cannabis helps to protect you and your loved ones from avoidable health risks.

### Tips for identifying legal cannabis
- Standardized cannabis symbol
- Child-resistant packaging
- Health warning message
- Tested for harmful levels of contaminants and accuracy of THC/CBD levels so you know what you're buying

### When you choose illegal cannabis, you could be consuming unknown levels of THC and harmful levels of:

### How to know when cannabis may be doobie-ous
- Suspicious payment options/does not confirm legal age
- Promotional elements
- Flashy multi-coloured packaging
For more information, visit Reduce your risk: Choose legal cannabis
